View:

Cumulative units

Actual
Expected (model)

Rolling win rate (last 20 bets)

Rolling WR
Expected WR

Settled bets · 0

Bets by price band

Distribution of primary model picks by fixed-win price. Higher bands carry more variance but also more upside.

Bets by venue

Where the model finds qualifying bets most often. Click to drill into venue-specific performance.

Performance by going

Win rate and ROI by track surface. Helps identify whether the model is biased toward Good vs Heavy tracks.

Performance by signal strength

Picks broken down by TR rank. Tighter filters (TR=1) typically have stronger edges than looser ones (TR=2 or 3).

Performance by day of week

Helps spot whether weekends or midweek meetings produce better edges. Saturday metropolitan racing is typically more competitive than midweek country.

Stake preferences

Unit size
Dollar value of 1 unit. Used to convert stakes/PnL between units and dollars.
Bet to return
Target gross return per bet in units (stake + profit on a winner). Stake = target / price.
Min stake
Minimum stake floor in units (caps very long shots).
Max stake
Maximum stake ceiling in units (caps short prices).

Data fetch

Last refreshed
just now · 08 May 2026 20:07
Re-fetch today
Trigger toprate_daily.py via GitHub Actions for today's date. Refresh this page after about 2 minutes to see new data.
Fetch a specific date
Pick a date and trigger toprate_daily.py to fetch (or backfill results for) that day. Useful for grabbing past meetings that got missed or updating results that arrived late.
GitHub repo
Format: owner/name · case sensitive. Used to dispatch workflows.
Open Actions ↗

Sync across devices

Sync status
Not configured. Add a GitHub token and Gist ID below to sync results and settings between iPhone and computer.
off
GitHub Personal Access Token
Classic PAT with the gist scope (for sync) and the workflow scope (for the fetch buttons above). Stored in localStorage on this device only.
Gist ID
The ID from your private Gist URL (the bit after /username/). Use the same ID on every device.

Bet log management

Storage usage
Calculating ...
—
Export bet log
Download a JSON backup of all your bet placements, odds taken, and comments. Independent from CSV export.
Import bet log
Restore from a previously exported JSON file. Existing entries with the same run_id will be overwritten.
Reset bet log
Clear all recorded bet placements, odds taken, and comments. This cannot be undone (export first to back up).

About

Primary model: Main — TR≤3 + Mid+Late+Total top 2 (gate min $3 at bet placement)

Walk-forward verified: Train ROI +24%, Test ROI +37% on Apr 9 - May 7 2026 sample.

Expected: 25.6% strike rate, +10.5% ROI@SP, +28.2% ROI@Top.

Pick volume: ~7.1/day average.
